description: Use root-specific Ritz values for LR Davidson residual preconditioning, including vectorized shifts in the shared TD preconditioner [22.7% primary-metric improvement with all correctness guardrails passing and no hard-reject condition.]

Limit real TDDFT Davidson expansion in `_lr_eig.real_eig` to requested roots to avoid non-target residual/preconditioner work [Primary metric improved 41.0% vs incumbent with correctness passing and no hard-reject condition.]

Limit symmetric `_lr_eig.eigh` Davidson trial-vector expansion to requested roots while keeping retained Ritz subspace behavior intact [Correctness passed, but the 0.144% primary-metric improvement is below the 2% acceptance threshold.]

Cap symmetric LR Davidson expansion to requested roots and add a 1e-3 default TD preconditioner level shift [Primary metric regressed 0.816% vs incumbent despite correctness passing, so it fails the 2% acceptance threshold.]

Correct real TDDFT Davidson preconditioning to pass the full lower LR residual block by using `-R_y` in `_lr_eig.real_eig` [Primary metric improved 23.1% vs incumbent with correctness passing, no hard reject, and no forbidden-path edits.]

Cap symmetric `_lr_eig.eigh` Davidson expansion to requested roots to avoid non-target Casida residual/preconditioner work [Primary metric improved 17.1% vs incumbent with correctness passing and no hard-reject or forbidden-path condition.]

Limit symmetric `_lr_eig.eigh` residual and preconditioner candidate generation to requested target roots [Primary metric improved 15.6% vs incumbent with correctness passing and no hard-reject or forbidden-path condition.]

Pass occupied-only MO coefficient/occupation arrays into DFT TD response kernel cache setup for restricted TDA/TDDFT and RKS/UKS Casida paths, avoiding zero-occupation virtual columns while preserving matvecs and solver tolerances [Correctness passed, but the 0.363% primary-metric improvement is below the 2% acceptance threshold.]

Add a configurable 0.02 Hartree spectral shift to `_lr_eig.real_eig` correction preconditioning to reduce real TDDFT response batches while leaving Casida `eigh` paths unchanged. [Correctness passed, but the 0.159% primary-metric improvement is below the 2% acceptance threshold.]

Add a 0.05 Hartree real_eig correction preconditioner spectral shift to reduce late-cycle B3LYP TDDFT response work [Primary metric improved 4.96% vs incumbent with correctness passing and no hard-reject or forbidden-path condition.]

Reduce DFT TD response setup/allocation overhead by using occupied-only response cache inputs and cheaper restricted TD/Casida matvec array handling [Correctness passed, but the 0.409% primary-metric improvement is below the 2% acceptance threshold.]

Stable-sort threshold-selected RHF/UHF Koopmans TD initial guesses by increasing diagonal gap before Davidson truncation [Correctness passed, but the 0.085% primary-metric improvement is below the 2% acceptance threshold.]

Add configurable LR correction preconditioner shifts in `_lr_eig.py`: a small `+1e-3` shift for symmetric `eigh` corrections and a stronger `+8e-2` shift for `real_eig` corrections to improve Davidson convergence without changing tolerances. [Correctness passed, but the candidate regressed the primary metric by 20.1% vs incumbent and increased Davidson work.]

Reduce DFT TD response setup/allocation overhead by using occupied-only response-cache inputs, full remaining TD response memory, and cheaper restricted/Casida matvec array handling [Correctness passed, but the 0.334% primary-metric improvement is below the 2% acceptance threshold.]

Vectorize symmetric `_lr_eig.eigh` correction preconditioning for unconverged target residuals in one batched preconditioner call while preserving solver tolerances, linear-dependency filtering, and response batch selection. [Correctness passed, but the 0.167% primary-metric improvement is below the 2% acceptance threshold.]

Taper the accepted real_eig correction preconditioner shift downward for late-stage residuals below 100x tolerance while preserving solver tolerances and root filtering [Correctness passed, but the primary metric regressed 1.62% vs incumbent and total matvec applications increased to 178.]
